data.title: Victor Group Holdings Requests Voluntary Suspension Amid Acquisition Plans
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Victor Group Holdings Ltd ( (AU:VIG) ) has shared an update.

Victor Group Holdings Limited, listed on the Australian Securities Exchange under the ticker VIG, has requested a voluntary suspension of its securities from trading starting June 2, 2025. This suspension is due to an impending announcement regarding a significant acquisition or investment. The company has stated that the suspension will remain until either the announcement is made or normal trading resumes on June 5, 2025. This move indicates a strategic development for Victor Group Holdings, potentially impacting its market position and stakeholder interests.

data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

An announcement from China Development Bank Financial Leasing Co Ltd Class H ( (HK:1606) ) is now available.

China Development Bank Financial Leasing Co., Ltd. has announced an update to its final cash dividend for the year ending December 31, 2024. The dividend declared is RMB 0.8905 per 10 shares, with shareholders’ approval set for June 30, 2025, and payment scheduled for August 8, 2025. This announcement reflects the company’s commitment to returning value to its shareholders and may influence investor sentiment positively.

More about China Development Bank Financial Leasing Co Ltd Class H

China Development Bank Financial Leasing Co., Ltd. operates in the financial leasing industry, providing leasing services primarily focused on aircraft, infrastructure, ship, and vehicle leasing. The company is a significant player in the leasing market, leveraging its connections with the China Development Bank to support its operations.

data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Carbon Transition ASA ( (DE:S5B) ) just unveiled an update.

Aquila Holdings ASA has announced an extraordinary general meeting on June 20, 2025, to discuss its acquisition of Fjord Defence AS, a private placement of 75 million new shares, and a potential subsequent offering. This strategic move is expected to reposition the company in the defense industry, impacting its operations and market focus, and potentially altering its stakeholder dynamics.

More about Carbon Transition ASA

Aquila Holdings ASA is a Norwegian seismic multi-client and investment company listed on Euronext Expand. It specializes in 3D ocean bottom node seismic multi-client data for near-field exploration, with key assets in Norway and Egypt. The company also focuses on investments in listed companies and those expected to be listed. Subject to the acquisition of Fjord Defence AS, Aquila plans to reposition as a compounder in the defense industry and change its name to Fjord Defence Group ASA.

NTT UD REIT Investment Corporation ( (JP:8956) ) has shared an update.

NTT UD REIT Investment Corporation announced the transfer of its interest in the Kanagawa Science Park R&D Building, citing increasing maintenance costs and favorable market conditions as reasons for the sale. An announcement from Breedon ( (GB:BREE) ) is now available.

Breedon Group PLC has announced that its issued share capital consists of 346,473,017 ordinary shares, all of which carry voting rights. This information is crucial for shareholders as it determines the denominator for calculating any changes in their shareholding interests under the Financial Conduct Authority’s Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules.

Breedon Group PLC operates in the construction materials industry, primarily focusing on the production and supply of aggregates, asphalt, ready-mixed concrete, and cement. The latest update is out from Mingfa Group (International) Co. Ltd. ( (HK:0846) ).

Mingfa Group (International) Co. Ltd. has announced a progress update on the restructuring of the boards of directors of its PRC subsidiaries. As of the latest update, two subsidiaries have submitted applications for director changes, pending approval from local regulatory authorities. The restructuring will be finalized once these approvals are granted, and the company will continue to provide monthly updates on the progress.

data.title: Gigante Salmon Surpasses First Harvest Expectations
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Gigante Salmon AS ( (DE:96M) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Gigante Salmon has successfully completed its first harvest from trial production, achieving a total harvest volume of 694 tons HOG, surpassing the expected 650 tons. The company is in the final phase of constructing its facility, with two out of three production basins completed, and plans to release 2.2 million smolt in the third quarter of 2025, aiming for a full annual capacity of approximately 16,000 tonnes HOG by 2028.

More about Gigante Salmon AS

Gigante Salmon is a land-based salmon farming company with its first production facility under construction on Lille Indre Rosøy in Rødøy, Norway. The company employs a unique aquaculture concept based on a flow-through system, which combines the benefits of conventional and land-based aquaculture while addressing issues associated with traditional sea-based farming.
